positive: A whimsical, abstract geometric constellation portrait of a majestic lion's head, emerging from interlocking lines and glowing celestial particles. The design should be highly stylized, combining Art Deco symmetry with modern line art. Deep indigo and sapphire blue background with striking accents of bright gold and warm amber. The lion's mane should be composed of star paths and fragmented geometric shapes, giving it a luminous, ethereal glow. Clean, strong silhouette, high contrast, centered composition, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Studio lighting, vector illustration style, highly detailed, minimalist fantasy art.
